calc_traces.title: Payback
calc_traces.formula: Payback uses cumulative yearwise cash accrual including replacement and turnaround events

calc_traces.title: Recurring maintenance timing basis
calc_traces.formula: Yearwise OPEX includes discrete packing replacement, utility-island replacement, and turnaround events instead of a flat annualized maintenance burden

calc_traces.title: Construction funding timing basis
calc_traces.formula: Construction funding uses staged procurement draws, procurement-linked peak working capital, and interest during construction before operations start.

calc_traces.title: Debt-service coverage basis
calc_traces.formula: DSCR = CFADS / debt service, where CFADS = revenue - opex - tax and debt service = principal + interest.

calc_traces.title: Lender-style coverage basis
calc_traces.formula: LLCR = PV(loan-life CFADS) / opening debt and PLCR = PV(project-life CFADS) / opening debt, discounted at the debt screening rate.
